aries.text: Your birthday season brings a surge of creative energy that's begging to be channeled into something tangible. Stop overthinking that project and just start—messy first drafts are how masterpieces begin. The confidence you're feeling isn't arrogance; it's alignment.

taurus.text: Today marks the Sun's entrance into your sign, turning the spotlight squarely on you for the next month. What do you actually want, not what everyone else expects? Take the afternoon to do something that feeds your soul rather than your schedule.

gemini.text: That conversation you've been avoiding? It's taking up more mental space than actually having it would. Mercury's position suggests your words will land better than you think, so reach out before lunch. Sometimes clarity comes from speaking, not from endless internal rehearsal.

cancer.text: You're feeling the pull to retreat, and honestly, that's exactly what you need right now. Spring isn't just about bursting forth—it's also about what's germinating beneath the surface. Give yourself permission to work quietly on something before sharing it with the world.

leo.text: Your social calendar is lighting up, but pay attention to which invitations genuinely excite you versus which feel like obligations. That side project you mentioned last month deserves more of your attention than you've been giving it. Take the longer route home and let your mind wander.

virgo.text: Is perfectionism protecting you or holding you back? Today's energy asks you to distinguish between the two. Someone at work is noticing your efforts more than you realize—don't downplay your contributions when they're acknowledged.

libra.text: Adventure is calling, even if it's just exploring a new neighborhood or finally opening that book you've been meaning to read. Your ruler Venus is encouraging expansion beyond your usual routines. Say yes to the unexpected invitation.

scorpio.text: Financial clarity arrives when you stop avoiding the spreadsheet and just look at the numbers honestly. There's power in knowing exactly where you stand. A secret you've been keeping might be weighing heavier than the freedom of sharing it would—consider your options carefully.

sagittarius.text: Partnerships are highlighted today, and not just the romantic kind. Who in your life actually challenges you to grow rather than just agreeing with everything you say? Those are the people worth investing in right now.

capricorn.text: Your productivity is impressive, but your body is asking for basic maintenance you've been postponing. Schedule that appointment, drink more water, take the actual lunch break. Small adjustments to your daily routine will yield surprising results by month's end.

aquarius.text: Creative blocks dissolve when you stop trying to force innovation and just play. That hobby you loved as a kid? There's wisdom in revisiting it now. Your unique perspective is exactly what a current situation needs, even if others don't see it yet.

pisces.text: Home and family matters need your attention, but in a nurturing way, not a sacrificial one. What would make your personal space feel more like a sanctuary? Sometimes the best thing you can do for others is to fill your own cup first.

aries.overview: Your natural momentum gets a boost this week, but the real power lies in knowing when to pause. That restless energy you're feeling wants direction, not just release.
aries.love: Someone's mixed signals might frustrate you, though what looks like hesitation could actually be thoughtfulness. Give people time to match your pace instead of assuming they're not interested.
aries.career: A project you thought was finished might need another round of revisions. Your initial instinct will be to push back, but these changes could actually strengthen your position.
aries.advice: Channel that famous Aries courage into one uncomfortable conversation you've been avoiding. The anticipation is worse than the actual moment will be.

taurus.overview: Spring's influence feels especially strong for you right now, bringing fresh perspectives to situations you thought were set in stone. You're ready to grow, even if that means outgrowing certain comforts.
taurus.love: Vulnerability might not come naturally to you, but this week rewards emotional honesty over playing it safe. Let someone see the version of you that isn't always perfectly composed.
taurus.career: Financial opportunities appear, though they'll require you to trust a process that isn't fully visible yet. Your practical nature wants guarantees, but sometimes you have to plant seeds before you see the garden.
taurus.advice: That thing you keep saying you'll do 'eventually' deserves a real timeline now. Pick a date and commit to it.

gemini.overview: Your mind is buzzing with possibilities, which is your natural state, but this week asks you to actually choose one path and see it through. Depth over breadth will serve you better than usual.
gemini.love: You're craving intellectual stimulation from your relationships, and it's okay to want conversations that go beyond surface-level pleasantries. Ask the questions you're actually curious about instead of sticking to small talk.
gemini.career: Communication breakdowns are likely if you're moving too fast and assuming others are following your thought process. Slow down enough to bring people along with you, even if it feels tedious.
gemini.advice: Finish one thing completely before starting three new projects. The satisfaction of completion might surprise you.

cancer.overview: Your intuition is particularly sharp right now, picking up on undercurrents others miss entirely. Trust those gut feelings even when you can't logically explain them.
cancer.love: You might be giving more emotional labor than you're receiving, and this week highlights that imbalance. It's not selfish to want reciprocity in how you care for each other.
cancer.career: A workplace dynamic shifts, creating space for you to step into a role you've been quietly preparing for. Don't downplay your qualifications when opportunity comes knocking.
cancer.advice: Create one boundary around your time or energy and actually enforce it this week, even if it feels uncomfortable at first.

leo.overview: Recognition might come from an unexpected direction this week, reminding you that your influence reaches further than you realize. Stay open to appreciation that doesn't look how you imagined it would.
leo.love: Your generous heart wants to fix someone's problems, but what they actually need is your presence, not your solutions. Sometimes listening is the greatest gift you can offer.
leo.career: A collaborative project brings out your best qualities, though sharing the spotlight might challenge your ego slightly. Remember that your light doesn't dim when others shine too.
leo.advice: Let yourself be a beginner at something new without needing to immediately excel at it.

virgo.overview: Perfectionism might be blocking progress on something that could move forward even in an imperfect state. This week asks you to distinguish between genuinely important details and unnecessary refinements.
virgo.love: You're analyzing a relationship situation that might actually benefit from less thinking and more feeling. Not everything needs to be understood completely before you can enjoy it.
virgo.career: Your organizational skills are needed, but be careful not to get so caught up in systems and processes that you lose sight of the bigger purpose. Efficiency is a tool, not the goal itself.
virgo.advice: Do something purely for pleasure this week, with no productivity or self-improvement angle attached to it whatsoever.

libra.overview: A decision you've been weighing endlessly needs to be made, and this week's energy pushes you toward finally choosing. Your desire to keep all options open is actually creating more stress than commitment would.
libra.love: Harmony is important to you, but not at the cost of your authentic feelings. That thing you've been hesitating to bring up will likely go better than your worried mind predicts.
libra.career: A partnership or collaboration reaches a turning point where you'll need to advocate for your interests more directly. Being agreeable has its place, but so does knowing your worth.
libra.advice: Notice where you're people-pleasing out of habit rather than genuine care, and experiment with disappointing someone minor to honor yourself.

scorpio.overview: Something you've been holding onto needs to be released, and you already know what it is. This week offers the right conditions for letting go, even though your instinct is to maintain control.
scorpio.love: Emotional intensity is your comfort zone, but this week might call for a lighter touch. Not every interaction needs to plumb the depths of the soul—sometimes surface-level connection has its own value.
scorpio.career: Information comes your way that changes your understanding of a workplace situation. Use this knowledge strategically rather than revealing everything you know right away.
scorpio.advice: Practice forgiveness, whether that's toward someone else or yourself. Holding onto resentment is exhausting you more than you admit.

sagittarius.overview: Your optimism is infectious this week, drawing people and opportunities into your orbit. Just make sure you're not promising more than you can actually deliver in your enthusiasm.
sagittarius.love: Freedom and commitment don't have to be opposing forces, though you sometimes treat them that way. Someone might be offering you both if you can shift your perspective slightly.
sagittarius.career: A learning opportunity presents itself, which naturally excites you, but consider whether this new direction serves your existing goals or distracts from them. Not every interesting path is your path.
sagittarius.advice: Follow through on one commitment before making new ones. Your word means something, and overextending dilutes your impact.

capricorn.overview: The structures you've built are solid, but this week asks whether they're still serving the person you're becoming. Stability is important, though not if it's keeping you stuck in an outdated version of yourself.
capricorn.love: You might be keeping emotional distance out of habit rather than actual need for protection right now. Consider that letting someone closer doesn't mean losing control of the situation.
capricorn.career: Your hard work is building toward something significant, but progress might feel slower than you'd like. Trust that incremental movement still counts, even when you want dramatic leaps forward.
capricorn.advice: Rest is productive too, even though your achievement-oriented mind resists this truth. Schedule actual downtime like you would any other important appointment.

aquarius.overview: Your unconventional ideas are gaining traction with people who previously didn't get what you were talking about. The world is catching up to where your mind has already been.
aquarius.love: Emotional availability might feel foreign to you, but this week rewards showing up as a whole person rather than just the intellectual, detached version. Let someone see that you have feelings beyond thoughts.
aquarius.career: A group project benefits from your innovative thinking, though you'll need to translate your vision into language others can actually work with. Brilliance without communication is just internal fireworks.
aquarius.advice: Engage with one tradition or conventional approach without immediately trying to revolutionize it. Sometimes there's wisdom in what already exists.

pisces.overview: Your boundaries between yourself and others might be especially porous right now, making it crucial to distinguish your emotions from what you're absorbing from people around you. Not everything you feel originates with you.
pisces.love: Romance and fantasy are beautiful, but this week calls for seeing someone as they actually are rather than who you imagine they could become. Love the reality, not just the potential.
pisces.career: Your creative instincts are strong, and trusting them will lead somewhere interesting, but you'll need to balance inspiration with practical execution. Dreams need structure to become real.
pisces.advice: Spend time alone to clear out the emotional static you've picked up from others. Your empathy is a gift, but it needs regular maintenance.

aries.overview: Happy solar return, Aries! April ignites your personal new year with the Sun blazing through your sign until the 19th, amplifying your natural leadership and pioneering spirit. As Mars, your ruling planet, moves through sensitive Cancer, you're learning to balance assertiveness with emotional intelligence. The lunar eclipse on April 13th activates your axis of self and partnership, bringing clarity about what you truly need from your closest relationships.
aries.love: Vulnerability becomes your superpower this month as Mars in Cancer softens your approach to intimacy. The eclipse mid-month may bring a pivotal conversation or revelation that reshapes an important relationship, releasing old patterns that no longer serve your growth.
aries.career: Your professional magnetism peaks during Aries season, drawing exciting opportunities and recognition for your innovative ideas. After the Sun enters Taurus on the 19th, shift your focus to consolidating resources and building sustainable structures around your ambitions.
aries.health: Channel your abundant fire energy through physical movement, but honor the emotional processing that Mars in Cancer demands. Spring's renewal invites you to establish healthier boundaries between action and rest, preventing the burnout that comes from constant doing.
aries.advice: Trust that true courage includes knowing when to pause and feel. Your greatest breakthroughs this April come from honoring both your warrior spirit and your tender heart.

taurus.overview: April begins with an introspective prelude as the Sun illuminates your twelfth house of closure and spiritual integration until the 19th. Your birthday season commences when the Sun enters your sign, just as Venus, your ruling planet, dances through Pisces then Aries, awakening your magnetism and creative expression. The lunar eclipse on April 13th highlights your work-life balance, inviting you to release perfectionist tendencies that drain your vital energy.
taurus.love: Venus in mystical Pisces deepens your romantic sensibilities early in the month, drawing soulful connections and heightening your intuitive understanding of loved ones. After Venus enters Aries on the 5th, your desires become clearer and bolder—don't be afraid to initiate what your heart truly wants.
taurus.career: The eclipse in your work sector demands honest assessment of your daily routines and service to others. Taurus season brings renewed confidence in your professional worth, making late April ideal for negotiations, launches, or asking for what you deserve.
taurus.health: Rest deeply during the first half of April, allowing your body and psyche to complete an important healing cycle. Once the Sun enters your sign, vitality returns with spring's full bloom—embrace movement that connects you to earth and pleasure.
taurus.advice: Release what you've been carrying that was never yours to hold. Your birthday season promises fresh starts, but only after you've honored the necessary endings.

gemini.overview: April activates your social networks and future visions as the Sun illuminates your eleventh house through the 19th, connecting you with kindred spirits and collaborative opportunities. Mercury, your ruling planet, moves through Aries and then your sign, accelerating communication and bringing mental clarity to long-brewing ideas. The lunar eclipse on April 13th spotlights your creative expression and joy sectors, asking what authentic pleasure means to you beyond external validation.
gemini.love: Friendship and romance blend beautifully this month, with potential for connections that stimulate both your mind and heart. The eclipse may bring a creative or romantic revelation, helping you distinguish between what genuinely lights you up and what you pursue out of habit or obligation.
gemini.career: Your networking abilities shine brilliantly, opening doors through conversations and community connections rather than traditional channels. When Mercury enters Gemini after April 16th, your communication becomes irresistibly persuasive—pitch ideas, write, teach, and share your multifaceted brilliance.
gemini.health: Mental stimulation feeds you, but notice if your nervous system becomes overstimulated by constant input. Spring invites you to practice presence with one thing at a time, discovering that depth can be as nourishing as variety.
gemini.advice: Your ideas have extraordinary value right now—trust them enough to share generously. The connections you cultivate this April will bear fruit throughout the year ahead.

cancer.overview: Your professional realm takes center stage as the Sun illuminates your tenth house of career and public recognition through April 19th, amplifying your visibility and leadership potential. Mars, currently traveling through your sign, grants you unusual courage and initiative—use this warrior energy wisely to advocate for yourself and your ambitions. The lunar eclipse on April 13th falls in your home and foundation sector, potentially bringing family matters or living situations to an emotional turning point.
cancer.love: With Mars energizing your sign, you're expressing desires more directly than usual, which can be refreshingly clarifying in relationships. The eclipse invites deep emotional honesty about your roots and what foundation you need to feel truly secure in intimacy.
cancer.career: This is your moment to step into the spotlight you've been preparing for, Cancer—your efforts are being noticed by the right people. The Sun's movement through your most public houses supports promotions, launches, or bold professional moves that align with your authentic purpose.
cancer.health: Mars in your sign provides physical vitality but can also manifest as restlessness or irritability if emotions aren't processed consciously. Prioritize outlets that honor both your warrior and nurturer sides—perhaps martial arts, vigorous gardening, or dance that moves feelings through your body.
cancer.advice: Your sensitivity is not separate from your strength—it is your strength. Lead this month with the full spectrum of what you feel, and watch how your authenticity inspires others.

leo.overview: April expands your horizons as the Sun journeys through your ninth house of adventure, higher learning, and philosophical exploration until the 19th. Your ruling Sun then enters grounded Taurus, shifting your focus to career foundations and long-term ambitions. The lunar eclipse on April 13th illuminates your communication sector, potentially bringing important conversations, learning opportunities, or sibling/neighbor dynamics to a crescendo that demands authentic expression.
leo.love: Romance takes on an adventurous quality this month, with potential for connections that expand your worldview or reignite passion through shared exploration. Speak your truth boldly during the eclipse period—your voice carries creative power that can transform stagnant relationship patterns.
leo.career: Your vision extends beyond immediate concerns toward larger possibilities and meaningful work that reflects your values. After the 19th, Taurus season supports practical steps toward professional goals, especially those requiring patience, strategy, and collaboration with established structures.
leo.health: Spring's renewal calls you outdoors and into movement that feels joyful rather than obligatory—your lion heart thrives on play. The eclipse may bring awareness to how you communicate with your own body; listen to its wisdom with the same generosity you extend to others.
leo.advice: Your natural radiance multiplies when directed toward purposes larger than personal glory. Seek teachers, philosophies, and adventures that challenge you to grow beyond familiar territories.

virgo.overview: April draws you into deeper waters as the Sun illuminates your eighth house of transformation, shared resources, and psychological depths through the 19th. Mercury, your ruling planet, travels through bold Aries and then communicative Gemini, helping you articulate insights from your inner explorations. The lunar eclipse on April 13th activates your financial and self-worth axis, bringing clarity about what you truly value beyond productivity and usefulness to others.
virgo.love: Intimacy deepens this month as you're willing to explore emotional territories you usually analyze from a safe distance. Vulnerability, though uncomfortable for your discerning nature, becomes the gateway to the soul-level connections you secretly crave but rarely allow yourself.
virgo.career: Collaborative projects and shared resources come into focus, requiring trust and negotiation rather than your preferred self-sufficiency. The eclipse illuminates your earning potential and asks whether your compensation reflects your true worth—practical Virgo, it's time to reassess.
virgo.health: Your healing journey goes deeper than symptoms this month, inviting exploration of emotional and energetic patterns beneath physical manifestations. Spring's renewal supports releasing control and trusting your body's innate wisdom, even when it doesn't follow logical protocols.
virgo.advice: Perfection is an illusion that keeps you from the messy, beautiful reality of being human. This April, practice letting people see you unpolished—your authenticity is far more magnetic than your capability.

libra.overview: Relationships take center stage as the Sun illuminates your seventh house of partnership through April 19th, highlighting both personal and professional collaborations. Venus, your ruling planet, moves from dreamy Pisces into fiery Aries, shifting your approach to love from receptive to initiatory. The lunar eclipse on April 13th falls directly in your sign, marking a powerful personal turning point that asks you to honor your individual needs alongside your natural tendency toward harmony and compromise.
libra.love: The eclipse in your sign is a cosmic invitation to reclaim parts of yourself you've softened or surrendered for the sake of keeping peace. When Venus enters Aries on the 5th, your desires become clearer and less negotiable—practice asking for what you want without apology or excessive diplomacy.
libra.career: Partnerships prove pivotal this month, whether forming new alliances or renegotiating existing collaborations to reflect evolved priorities. Your diplomatic gifts serve you well, but the eclipse reminds you that fairness includes honoring your own voice, not just mediating everyone else's.
libra.health: Balance, your eternal quest, may require paradoxical acceptance that some seasons emphasize one side of the scales more than the other. Spring invites you to physical practices that help you feel your center—yoga, dance, or martial arts that train you to be both graceful and strong.
libra.advice: True partnership can only exist between two whole people. This April, your greatest gift to your relationships is becoming more fully, unapologetically yourself.

scorpio.overview: April illuminates your daily rhythms and service as the Sun travels through your sixth house until the 19th, inviting refinement of your routines and health practices. Pluto, your modern ruling planet, continues its transformative journey through Aquarius in your home sector, slowly revolutionizing your understanding of roots and foundation. The lunar eclipse on April 13th falls in your twelfth house of spirituality and release, calling you to surrender control and trust the unseen forces that guide your transformation.
scorpio.love: Intimacy deepens through small, daily acts of care and attention rather than grand gestures this month. The eclipse encourages releasing old relationship patterns rooted in fear or the need to control outcomes—true power in love comes from vulnerability, not vigilance.
scorpio.career: Your meticulous attention to craft and willingness to serve excellence positions you for quiet but significant professional advancement. Focus on mastering your skills and improving systems rather than seeking recognition; your competence speaks louder than self-promotion.
scorpio.health: This is an excellent month to address health matters you've been avoiding or to establish sustainable wellness routines that honor your body's needs. The eclipse supports releasing addictive patterns or escapist habits, replacing them with practices that genuinely restore your formidable energy.
scorpio.advice: Your intensity is a gift, but not everything requires your full investigative powers. Practice discernment about where to direct your passion, and allow spring's lighter energy to occasionally soften your serious depths.

sagittarius.overview: April activates your fifth house of creativity, romance, and joyful self-expression as the Sun illuminates this playful sector through the 19th. Jupiter, your ruling planet, continues expanding your domestic realm and emotional foundations, helping you create a home base that supports your adventurous spirit. The lunar eclipse on April 13th highlights your friendships and community connections, potentially bringing certain social circles to a completion while opening space for new kindred spirits who match your evolving vision.
sagittarius.love: Romance and creative passion intertwine beautifully this month—let your playful, spontaneous nature lead the way. The eclipse may shift your social landscape, and with it, your romantic opportunities; trust that departures make room for connections that truly celebrate your philosophical and adventurous heart.
sagittarius.career: Your natural enthusiasm and creative vision inspire others, making this an excellent month for presentations, pitches, or projects that benefit from your optimistic energy. After the Sun enters Taurus on the 19th, attention shifts to practical daily execution of your grand visions.
sagittarius.health: Spring's renewal calls you outdoors and into activities that feel like play rather than exercise—hike, dance, explore new trails that feed your need for movement and discovery. Joy itself is medicine for your sign; prioritize what makes you laugh and feel vibrantly alive.
sagittarius.advice: Your vision is naturally expansive, but this April, find the sacred in small, present moments. Sometimes the greatest adventure is being fully here, now, with what's directly in front of you.

capricorn.overview: April draws your attention homeward as the Sun illuminates your fourth house of family, roots, and emotional foundation through the 19th. Saturn, your ruling planet, continues its journey through Pisces in your communication sector, teaching you to express authority through compassion and intuitive wisdom. The lunar eclipse on April 13th peaks in your career house, potentially bringing professional recognition, completion, or a pivotal choice about your public direction.
capricorn.love: Emotional intimacy deepens as you allow loved ones to see the private, vulnerable self you usually reserve for only your closest circle. The eclipse may shift your public commitments, which in turn affects time and energy available for relationships—honest conversations about priorities serve everyone.
capricorn.career: The eclipse in your tenth house marks a significant milestone or turning point in your professional journey, possibly bringing recognition you've steadily worked toward. Your natural leadership shines, but remember that true authority includes emotional intelligence, not just competence and achievement.
capricorn.health: Tend to your foundation this month—quality rest, nourishing foods, and emotional processing create the stability from which your ambitions can sustainably grow. Spring invites you to soften your driven nature occasionally, trusting that strategic rest enhances rather than impedes your long-term goals.
capricorn.advice: Your mountain goat determination has carried you far, but this April, honor that even mountains have roots that run deep and need tending. Professional success means little without an emotional foundation to hold it.

aquarius.overview: Communication and learning take center stage as the Sun illuminates your third house through April 19th, energizing your already active mind with curiosity and connections. Uranus, your ruling planet, continues its revolutionary journey through Taurus in your domestic sector, slowly but surely transforming your relationship with home and security. The lunar eclipse on April 13th falls in your ninth house of expansion and belief systems, potentially challenging perspectives you've outgrown and opening doors to new philosophical territories.
aquarius.love: Intellectual connection proves essential in romantic matters this month—you need partners who can engage your innovative mind and unconventional perspectives. The eclipse invites you to question relationship beliefs you've inherited rather than consciously chosen; true intimacy requires authenticity, not conformity.
aquarius.career: Your networking abilities and communication skills open unexpected doors, especially through technology, innovation, or community organizing. Share your visionary ideas generously—your ability to see patterns and future possibilities offers value that more conventional thinkers cannot provide.
aquarius.health: Your nervous system requires particular attention this month, as mental stimulation can tip into overstimulation for your electric sign. Ground your airy nature through practices that connect you to body and earth—even rebels need roots to effectively revolutionize.
aquarius.advice: Your vision of the future is valuable, but don't become so focused on what could be that you miss what is. This April, practice presence alongside your natural forward-thinking orientation.

pisces.overview: April highlights your values and resources as the Sun travels through your second house until the 19th, inviting practical attention to finances and self-worth. Neptune, your ruling planet, continues its long journey through your sign, dissolving old identity structures and inviting you to embody your most spiritually authentic self. The lunar eclipse on April 13th activates your eighth house of deep transformation, shared resources, and psychological depths, calling you to release what you've been carrying for others.
pisces.love: Venus begins the month in your sign before entering Aries on the 5th, shifting your romantic energy from receptive and dreamy to more direct and assertive about desires. The eclipse invites honest examination of patterns where you merge too completely with others, losing yourself in the process of loving them.
pisces.career: Focus on building tangible value and sustainable income streams that honor your creative and spiritual gifts without requiring you to sacrifice your wellbeing. Your intuitive understanding of collective needs positions you to offer services the world genuinely needs, if you can ground your vision in practical form.
pisces.health: Boundaries become essential this month, particularly energetic ones—your porous nature absorbs others' emotions and needs, depleting your vitality. Spring's renewal supports establishing practices that help you distinguish what's yours to feel and carry versus what belongs to others.
pisces.advice: Your compassion is limitless, but your human vessel has limits that deserve respect. This April, practice the radical act of caring for yourself with the same tenderness you extend to everyone else.
